description: AI-powered portfolio optimization, rebalancing intelligence, and performance attribution analysis for institutional investment management

agents.name: Allocation Optimizer
agents.description: Analyzes portfolio composition against target allocations, evaluates risk-adjusted returns, and generates optimized allocation strategies across asset classes

agents.name: Rebalancing Agent
agents.description: Monitors portfolio drift, identifies rebalance triggers, and produces trade recommendations to restore target allocation with minimal transaction cost

agents.name: Performance Attributor
agents.description: Decomposes portfolio returns into attribution factors including asset selection, sector allocation, currency effects, and timing contributions
